name: io.github.semwalajay83-sem/salesforce-metadata-mcp
description: 212 Salesforce tools: metadata, flows, Apex, LWC, Agentforce, OmniStudio, reports, permissions.

environmentVariables.name: SF_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Salesforce access token (or use SF_ALIAS / JWT variables instead)

environmentVariables.name: SF_ALIAS
environmentVariables.description: Salesforce CLI org alias (alternative to SF_ACCESS_TOKEN)
